datasets.name: kpi_summary
queryLines:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT trip_distance, fare_amount, unix_timestamp(tpep_dropoff_datetime) - unix_timestamp(tpep_pickup_datetime) AS duration_seconds
  FROM samples.nyctaxi.trips
  WHERE fare_amount > 0 AND trip_distance > 0 AND tpep_dropoff_datetime > tpep_pickup_datetime
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_trips,
  format_number(COUNT(*), 0) AS total_trips_label,
  ROUND(AVG(fare_amount), 2) AS avg_fare,
  CONCAT('$', CAST(ROUND(AVG(fare_amount), 2) AS STRING)) AS avg_fare_label,
  ROUND(AVG(trip_distance), 2) AS avg_distance,
  CONCAT(CAST(ROUND(AVG(trip_distance), 2) AS STRING), ' mi') AS avg_distance_label,
  ROUND(AVG(duration_seconds) / 60, 1) AS avg_minutes,
  CONCAT(CAST(ROUND(AVG(duration_seconds) / 60, 1) AS STRING), ' min') AS avg_minutes_label,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN fare_amount / trip_distance BETWEEN 2 AND 12 AND duration_seconds BETWEEN 180 AND 3600 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 3) AS trip_quality_rate,
  CONCAT(CAST(ROUND(100 * AVG(CASE WHEN fare_amount / trip_distance BETWEEN 2 AND 12 AND duration_seconds BETWEEN 180 AND 3600 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS STRING), '%') AS quality_label,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN trip_distance <= 2 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 3) AS short_trip_share,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN fare_amount > 50 OR trip_distance > 15 OR duration_seconds > 3600 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 3) AS exception_rate,
  CONCAT(CAST(ROUND(100 * AVG(CASE WHEN fare_amount > 50 OR trip_distance > 15 OR duration_seconds > 3600 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS STRING), '%') AS exception_label
FROM base

datasets.name: fare_bands
queryLines:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN fare_amount < 10 THEN 'Under $10' WHEN fare_amount < 20 THEN '$10-$20' WHEN fare_amount < 40 THEN '$20-$40' ELSE '$40+' END AS fare_band,
    CASE WHEN fare_amount < 10 THEN 1 WHEN fare_amount < 20 THEN 2 WHEN fare_amount < 40 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END AS sort_order,
    fare_amount, trip_distance
  FROM samples.nyctaxi.trips
  WHERE fare_amount > 0 AND trip_distance > 0
), agg AS (
  SELECT fare_band, sort_order, COUNT(*) AS trips, ROUND(AVG(fare_amount), 2) AS avg_fare, ROUND(AVG(trip_distance), 2) AS avg_distance
  FROM base GROUP BY fare_band, sort_order
)
SELECT fare_band, sort_order, trips, ROUND(trips / SUM(trips) OVER (), 3) AS trip_share, avg_fare, avg_distance
FROM agg ORDER BY sort_order

datasets.name: daily_trend
queryLines:
WITH daily AS (
  SELECT
  DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime) AS trip_date,
  COUNT(*) AS trips,
  ROUND(AVG(fare_amount), 2) AS avg_fare,
  ROUND(AVG(trip_distance), 2) AS avg_distance
FROM samples.nyctaxi.trips
WHERE fare_amount > 0 AND trip_distance > 0
GROUP BY DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime)
), ranked AS (
  SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY trips DESC, trip_date ASC) AS trip_rank
  FROM daily
)
SELECT trip_date, trips, avg_fare, avg_distance, trip_rank, CASE WHEN trip_rank <= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_peak
FROM ranked
ORDER BY trip_date

datasets.name: hourly_demand
queryLines:
WITH hourly AS (
  SELECT HOUR(tpep_pickup_datetime) AS pickup_hour, COUNT(*) AS trips, ROUND(AVG(fare_amount), 2) AS avg_fare, ROUND(AVG(trip_distance), 2) AS avg_distance
  FROM samples.nyctaxi.trips
  WHERE fare_amount > 0 AND trip_distance > 0
  GROUP BY HOUR(tpep_pickup_datetime)
), ranked AS (
  SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY trips DESC, pickup_hour ASC) AS hour_rank
  FROM hourly
)
SELECT pickup_hour, trips, ROUND(trips / MAX(trips) OVER (), 3) AS demand_index, avg_fare, avg_distance, hour_rank, CASE WHEN hour_rank <= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_peak_hour
FROM ranked ORDER BY pickup_hour

datasets.name: fare_distance_matrix
queryLines:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN trip_distance < 1 THEN '<1 mi' WHEN trip_distance < 3 THEN '1-3 mi' WHEN trip_distance < 7 THEN '3-7 mi' ELSE '7+ mi' END AS distance_band,
    CASE WHEN trip_distance < 1 THEN 1 WHEN trip_distance < 3 THEN 2 WHEN trip_distance < 7 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END AS distance_order,
    CASE WHEN fare_amount < 10 THEN 'Under $10' WHEN fare_amount < 20 THEN '$10-$20' WHEN fare_amount < 40 THEN '$20-$40' ELSE '$40+' END AS fare_band,
    CASE WHEN fare_amount < 10 THEN 1 WHEN fare_amount < 20 THEN 2 WHEN fare_amount < 40 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END AS fare_order,
    fare_amount
  FROM samples.nyctaxi.trips
  WHERE fare_amount > 0 AND trip_distance > 0
)
SELECT distance_band, distance_order, fare_band, fare_order, COUNT(*) AS trips, ROUND(AVG(fare_amount), 2) AS avg_fare
FROM base
GROUP BY distance_band, distance_order, fare_band, fare_order
ORDER BY distance_order, fare_order

datasets.name: rush_comparison
queryLines:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    HOUR(tpep_pickup_datetime) AS hr,
    fare_amount,
    trip_distance,
    (unix_timestamp(tpep_dropoff_datetime) - unix_timestamp(tpep_pickup_datetime))
      / 60.0 AS duration_min
  FROM
    samples.nyctaxi.trips
  WHERE
    fare_amount > 0
    AND trip_distance > 0
    AND tpep_dropoff_datetime > tpep_pickup_datetime
    AND (
      HOUR(tpep_pickup_datetime) BETWEEN 7 AND 9
      OR HOUR(tpep_pickup_datetime) BETWEEN 17 AND 19
    )
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN hr BETWEEN 7 AND 9 THEN 'AM Rush'
      ELSE 'PM Rush'
    END AS period,
    ROUND(AVG(duration_min), 1) AS avg_duration,
    COUNT(*) AS trips,
    ROUND(AVG(fare_amount / NULLIF(duration_min, 0)), 2) AS fare_per_min
  FROM
    base
  GROUP BY
    CASE
      WHEN hr BETWEEN 7 AND 9 THEN 'AM Rush'
      ELSE 'PM Rush'
    END
),
long_form AS (
  SELECT
    period,
    'Avg Duration (min)' AS metric,
    avg_duration AS value,
    1 AS sort_order
  FROM
    agg
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    period,
    'Trip Volume',
    trips,
    2
  FROM
    agg
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    period,
    'Fare per Minute ($)' AS metric,
    fare_per_min,
    3
  FROM
    agg
)
SELECT
  period,
  metric,
  sort_order,
  value,
  ROUND(value / MAX(value) OVER (PARTITION BY metric), 3) AS norm_value
FROM
  long_form
ORDER BY
  sort_order,
  period

datasets.name: hourly_by_daytype
queryLines:
WITH counts AS (
  SELECT
    HOUR(tpep_pickup_datetime) AS pickup_hour,
    CASE
      WHEN DAYOFWEEK(tpep_pickup_datetime) IN (1, 7) THEN 'Weekend'
      ELSE 'Weekday'
    END AS day_type,
    COUNT(*) AS trips
  FROM
    samples.nyctaxi.trips
  WHERE
    fare_amount > 0
    AND trip_distance > 0
  GROUP BY
    HOUR(tpep_pickup_datetime),
    CASE
      WHEN DAYOFWEEK(tpep_pickup_datetime) IN (1, 7) THEN 'Weekend'
      ELSE 'Weekday'
    END
),
day_counts AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN DAYOFWEEK(trip_date) IN (1, 7) THEN 'Weekend'
      ELSE 'Weekday'
    END AS day_type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT trip_date) AS num_days
  FROM
    (
      SELECT DISTINCT
        DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime) AS trip_date
      FROM
        samples.nyctaxi.trips
      WHERE
        fare_amount > 0
    )
  GROUP BY
    CASE
      WHEN DAYOFWEEK(trip_date) IN (1, 7) THEN 'Weekend'
      ELSE 'Weekday'
    END
)
SELECT
  c.pickup_hour,
  c.day_type,
  ROUND(c.trips * 1.0 / d.num_days, 1) AS avg_trips_per_day
FROM
  counts c
    JOIN day_counts d
      ON c.day_type = d.day_type
ORDER BY
  c.pickup_hour,
  c.day_type

datasets.name: fare_deviation
queryLines:
WITH daily AS (
  SELECT
    DAYOFWEEK(tpep_pickup_datetime) AS dow,
    CASE DAYOFWEEK(tpep_pickup_datetime)
      WHEN 1 THEN 'Sun'
      WHEN 2 THEN 'Mon'
      WHEN 3 THEN 'Tue'
      WHEN 4 THEN 'Wed'
      WHEN 5 THEN 'Thu'
      WHEN 6 THEN 'Fri'
      WHEN 7 THEN 'Sat'
    END AS day_name,
    ROUND(AVG(fare_amount), 2) AS avg_fare
  FROM
    samples.nyctaxi.trips
  WHERE
    fare_amount > 0
    AND trip_distance > 0
  GROUP BY
    DAYOFWEEK(tpep_pickup_datetime),
    CASE DAYOFWEEK(tpep_pickup_datetime)
      WHEN 1 THEN 'Sun'
      WHEN 2 THEN 'Mon'
      WHEN 3 THEN 'Tue'
      WHEN 4 THEN 'Wed'
      WHEN 5 THEN 'Thu'
      WHEN 6 THEN 'Fri'
      WHEN 7 THEN 'Sat'
    END
),
overall AS (
  SELECT
    ROUND(AVG(fare_amount), 2) AS overall_avg
  FROM
    samples.nyctaxi.trips
  WHERE
    fare_amount > 0
    AND trip_distance > 0
)
SELECT
  d.dow,
  d.day_name,
  d.avg_fare,
  o.overall_avg,
  ROUND(d.avg_fare - o.overall_avg, 2) AS deviation,
  ROUND((d.avg_fare - o.overall_avg) / o.overall_avg * 100, 1) AS pct_change
FROM
  daily d CROSS JOIN overall o
ORDER BY
  d.dow

lines: ## Beyond bar charts: an AI/BI Custom Viz infographic
Public `samples.nyctaxi.trips` data, shaped into KPI cards, glyphs, gauges, maps, and animated-looking analytical patterns with Vega-Lite.

frame.title: Trip Profile: Short Trips and Exceptions

lines: **Copy this pattern:** use one-row SQL summaries plus layered text/arc marks to create app-like executive KPI cards directly inside AI/BI dashboards.
## Custom Viz Gallery: Time, Shape & Comparison

Seven Vega-Lite patterns from the same taxi dataset: rolling trends, hourly profiles, heatmap matrices, radial composition, dumbbell comparisons, butterfly distributions, and variance charts with colored ▲▼ indicators.

**Copy these patterns:** each chart uses `custom-vega-viz` with a compact SQL dataset. The dumbbell normalizes metrics to a common scale; the butterfly mirrors one category to create a mirrored distribution; the variance chart uses diverging bars from a reference line with colored ▲▼ indicators.

jsonSpec.spec: {"data":{"name":"databricks_query"},"height":"container","width":"container","$schema":"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json","config":{"autosize":{"type":"fit","contains":"padding"},"view":{"stroke":null}},"transform":[{"calculate":"datum.metric == 'Avg Duration (min)' ? format(datum.value, '.1f') + ' min' : datum.metric == 'Trip Volume' ? format(datum.value, ',d') : '$' + format(datum.value, '.2f') + '/min'","as":"value_label"}],"layer":[{"mark":{"type":"rule","color":"#D1D5DB","strokeWidth":3},"encoding":{"y":{"field":"metric","type":"ordinal","sort":{"field":"sort_order"},"title":null,"axis":{"labelFontSize":11,"labelFontWeight":"bold"}},"x":{"aggregate":"min","field":"norm_value","type":"quantitative","scale":{"domain":[0.55,1.1]},"title":null,"axis":null},"x2":{"aggregate":"max","field":"norm_value"}}},{"mark":{"type":"point","filled":true,"size":250,"stroke":"white","strokeWidth":2},"encoding":{"y":{"field":"metric","type":"ordinal","sort":{"field":"sort_order"}},"x":{"field":"norm_value","type":"quantitative"},"color":{"field":"period","type":"nominal","scale":{"domain":["AM Rush","PM Rush"],"range":["#FFB000","#4C2DA8"]},"legend":{"orient":"top","title":null}},"tooltip":[{"field":"period"},{"field":"metric"},{"field":"value_label","title":"Value"}]}},{"mark":{"type":"text","fontSize":11,"dy":-16,"fontWeight":"bold"},"encoding":{"y":{"field":"metric","type":"ordinal","sort":{"field":"sort_order"}},"x":{"field":"norm_value","type":"quantitative"},"text":{"field":"value_label"},"color":{"field":"period","type":"nominal","scale":{"domain":["AM Rush","PM Rush"],"range":["#B45309","#4C2DA8"]},"legend":null}}}]}
